name: useInfiniteScroll
description: Hook that defines the logic for infinite scroll
examples: const { ref, loading } = useInfiniteScroll(() => console.log('infinite scroll'));

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback to execute when a click outside the target is detected

source.source: * @param {(event: Event) => void} callback The callback to execute when a click outside the target is detected

tokens.description: The callback to execute when a click outside the target is detected

parameters.description: The distance in pixels to trigger the callback
